case_title: LAPUZ-STEVENSON, MAGDELENA vs. WEST-WIND AUTOMOTIVE, INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAPUZ-STEVENSON, MAGDELENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST-WIND AUTOMOTIVE, INC. $733.57 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $813.57

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAPUZ-STEVENSON, MAGDELENA AS TO DEFENDANT WEST-WIND AUTOMOTIVE, INC.
